_note: Books from Dua Lipa's Manifesto Library (Livraria Lello, Porto / Service95) that were missing from our catalog AND have a citable, documented book ban. Only The Vegetarian cleared the reliability bar (Korea Herald / Korea Times / SCMP, Gyeonggi Province 2024). The Crucible, There There, Pachinko et al. are on the Manifesto list but had no citable book-ban record (not in PEN America's school-ban index) and stay list-only on the hub. Imported via scripts/import-nipissing-challenges.ts --input=.

entries.title: The Vegetarian
entries.author: Han Kang
entries.description: In 2024, schools across Gyeonggi Province, South Korea discarded thousands of books flagged for sexual content — including Han Kang's The Vegetarian — after conservative parents' groups petitioned the provincial education office. A national parents' association separately demanded that the Nobel laureate's novel be reclassified as 'harmful media' unsuitable for minors.
